Serial Murder Case
I really don't want to go, but
I have stuff I want to ask, so I guess I have to.
It takes courage to enter here.
Oh, I'm so glad you came.
Hehe, I thought you'd be coming soon.

It's an editorial department that's always empty.
No way,
it’s not all external people, right?
It feels desolate and a bit lonely.
As always, she gives off a scary vibe.
Is this style that emphasizes her chest her signature look?
Although it's not like she relies on her looks to get the job done, given her outfit, it can't be helped if people think that.
Hi, honey!
I'm not your honey, though.
Come on, stop being so stiff and go with the flow.
I didn't come here to mess around.
Hmph, well, fine.
I won't talk about the article at all.
Hey!
Oh, by the way, you are...
...Snipes, right?
Yep.
More importantly, about the article on Guy...
Phew.
So, you’re the one who’s grabbed that lucky star.
That's you, huh?
We're not talking about that right now.
Oh, right! So, you set up the detective agency with that inheritance, huh? Did you buy the rights to open the agency?
Look, I didn’t come here to talk about myself, and I definitely don’t appreciate being grilled about it.
Well, I was curious. I thought I heard that name somewhere and then it turned out to be you.
I can't believe it.
Hey, seriously, how about dating me? I'm not blinded by money or anything, but...
I have a good body, you know?
Hehehe, I'm really on point today.
Are you still hung up on that? I really want you to let it go.
The reason I came here is for this.
What are you going to do with that knowledge? Are you planning to threaten that person and have them say it was all a lie?
Do you realize that knowing won't let you blame that person?
Not that I was thinking of blaming them or anything.
So why do you want to know about that person? I'm not saying anything bad, just stop it already.
I don't intend to talk about that. Give it up.
I really love men like Guy. I can feel the power.
That's not what I'm asking about.
Oh, is your frown because you're jealous?
Please, whether they’re your friend or not, stop messing with my work.
Is that something someone who disturbs others' private lives can say?
Oh, famous people have a high price to pay for their fame. And anyway, Guy hasn’t said anything to me, right?
I haven't received a single complaint from Guy.
Ugh, that woman, I don't care if she has a good upbringing or whatever, I can't stand how she acts all high and mighty.
You're acting all high and mighty too.
What I have is armor. It's tough in many ways.
She's the daughter of the Dern family, right?
You really have done thorough research.
Of course. But being the daughter of that family must be tough, huh?
What do you mean by that?
Oh, you know, even though you're pretending not to.
Hehehe.
Ah.
Ah, I wanted to be born as a lady too.
I don’t tell lies.
That line itself is a lie, right?
Don't underestimate me. Even if my articles have some embellishment, they're based on true stories.
Criticizing my articles is the same as criticizing me.
I can't believe that article is true.
That's just your subjective view. The truth is always stranger than fiction.
It's the first time I've received a complaint from a third party as a reporter.
What do I really want to do now that I know the informant?
Even if I lodge a complaint against that person, the printed words won’t disappear.
Someone close to Guy leaked information.
There might be plenty of facts I don’t know.
Still, who would be leaking such information?
I wonder what Guy is doing now.
I wonder why Guy isn’t complaining?
If we think simply, it’s probably because the article is factual.
Could it be that?
I’m starting to feel like I don’t understand Guy anymore.
Is she going to be okay?
Is it...
Looks like they’re even investigating her family.
I don’t know the details, but I think she’s genuinely troubled.
If I could help her even a little...
Is that a complete hoax, or is it the truth?
Who would I even ask to find out?
Even if I’m moving like this, if it is true, it feels like a futile struggle.
What on earth should I do?
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
